Title: IRB / Ethical approvals

Owner: PI / Project Manager

Description:
Prepare and submit the Institutional Review Board (IRB) package required for field data collection. Include:
- Full protocol and methodology
- Consent forms (English and Portuguese)
- Participant information sheets
- Data handling and anonymization plan
- Risk assessment and mitigation

Acceptance criteria:
- IRB submission package compiled and reviewed
- Consent forms translated and proofread
- Submission tracked with expected timeline and owner assigned

Labels: governance, high-priority
